description: 一款基于各大企业信息API的工具，解决在遇到的各种针对国内企业信息收集难题。一键收集控股公司ICP备案、APP、小程序、微信公众号等信息聚合导出。支持MCP接入

findings.title: INSUFFICIENT_TOOL_DATA
findings.description: Tool 'APP' has no description - agents cannot reason about its purpose, and static analysis coverage is limited
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate the identified issue.
